name: Nuclearo dinosauro
lore:
Lore of Nuclearo dinosauro
                                    


Dinosahurus also known as Dino Sahur is a recent Italian Brainrot uploaded to TikTok by @noxaasht in 2025. It resembles a Dinosaur with drum.
Lyrics
Original (Indonesian)
Dinosahurus! Masih bersama anomali saat bulan puasa, berbeda dengan Tung Tung. Dinosaurus ini bisa dibilang baik. Dulu anomali ini sering membangunkan Sahur, tapi karena kelangkaannya, ia sekarang muncul hanya saat bulan sabit tiba. Lagu yang ia bawakan juga berbeda dengan Tung Tung saat membangunkan orang-orang. Seingat mimin suaranya seperti ini: "Walu dudu dan dadadi, walulu tob tob bali." Suara merdunya bikin orang ingin berdansa kala itu. "Tengoklah tuh ha!" Orang-orang berjoget di depan pintu, menikmati lagu yang ia bawakan. Kalian kalau ketemu dinosaurus seperti ini, diam saja ya, jangan takut. Siapa tahu dinyanyin.
Translated (English)
Dinosahurus! Still an anomaly during the fasting month, but unlike Tung Tung. This dinosaur can be said to be kind. In the past, this anomaly often woke people for Sahur, but due to its rarity, it now only appears when the crescent moon arrives. The song it sings is also different from Tung Tung's when waking people up. As the mod remembers, its voice sounded like this: "Walu dudu dan dadadi, walulu tob tob bali." Its melodious voice made people want to dance back then. "Look at that, huh!" People danced in front of their doors, enjoying the song it was singing. If you guys meet a dinosaur like this, just stay quiet, okay? Don't be afraid. Who knows, it might sing for you.
